candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line with populated values; best match for total revenue/sales.
Also a revenue total and numerically identical; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Priority list of revenue labels; both are top-line revenue rows, with the first being the cleaner primary label.

candidates.why: Direct cost of sales / operating revenue line; strongest COGS match.
Component of production cost, but narrower than full cost of revenue.

candidates.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility - Unclassified
candidates.why: Subcomponent of material expenses, not full COGS.
Only a component/adjustment, not full COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the direct full cost-of-sales style line rather than narrower components.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and clearly the best overhead measure; per rule, prefer explicit populated SG&A row and select only that row.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A component, but component rows are not needed when an explicit SG&A row exists.
Too broad and includes COGS; not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated. It already states excluding R&D, so no separate XRD row should be added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This indicates SG&A excludes R&D, but it is not itself an R&D expense row.
Balance sheet asset line for capitalized R&D, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross asset line, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense row appears on the income statement. Balance sheet R&D asset rows are not expense lines, so XRD is left empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best recurring interest-expense line; preferred over net finance totals and avoids FX/non-interest items.
Also a strong match and numerically identical in preview; useful alternate label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost but likely a component of total interest expense; selecting it in addition risks double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list of equivalent interest expense labels. Did not include lease-liability interest separately to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best book equity line because it explicitly excludes minority interests.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-only equity label; strong fallback.
Also appears equal to parent common equity; acceptable fallback if primary owner-equity labels are missing in some years.
Common equity label with identical values; useful fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Includes minority interest, so not preferred for BE when owner-equity lines exist.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list uses parent/owner equity lines first to exclude minority interests from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line; best match.
Equivalent minority interest label; good fallback.
Income statement allocation of earnings to minority interest, not balance-sheet MIB.

variables.notes: Selected balance-sheet minority interest labels only, avoiding income-statement profit-allocation rows.
